data.name: cb_bfSelect.ToolTip
data.value:
If an unsupported screen is opened and the application crashes, please check this option. This will reset the active screen to the Program List screen (SELECT).
Currently known screens that may cause crashes: 1. 4D graphics display. 2. Bus configuration screens that require WinCE support, such as PROFINET. 3. Keyboard View.

data.name: bt_UploadArea.ToolTip
data.value: Drag program files to this area to upload them to the controller. Only LS, TP, PC, and VR file types are supported. Note: KAREL programs and VR variables must be compatible with the target controller version.
